claim: There was an estimated 30 million cases of pneumonia in young children worldwide in 2010.
evidence_sentences: FINDINGS We identified 89 eligible studies and estimated that in 2010, 11·9 million (95% CI 10·3-13·9 million) episodes of severe and 3·0 million (2·1-4·2 million) episodes of very severe ALRI resulted in hospital admissions in young children worldwide.
